final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu (小红书) cover image for a product launch announcement (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "高级杂志感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Céline (Phoebe Philo era) campaign minimalism, Kinfolk magazine editorial heritage, Studio Nicholson lookbook composition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be diagonal composition
Subject: must include the theme text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs high-contrast accent colors — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
